_meta.description: Verified cross-system correlations between HD and Astrology
_meta.policy: Only add entries that have EXPLICIT documented agreement between both systems. No interpolation. No synthesis.

sun_gate_33_leo.correlation: Both relate to the conscious personality sun placement. Gate 33 is the Personality Sun's I Ching position; the tropical zodiac sign gives cultural-seasonal context.
sun_gate_33_leo.source: Calculation engine — same longitude, different mapping systems

type_projector_saturn.correlation: Projectors frequently have Saturn prominent. Both systems point to a non-sacral, recognition-dependent energy pattern requiring patience and timing.
type_projector_saturn.source: Cross-system pattern noted in forge_mapping.json; not statistically verified

emotional_authority_water_signs.astroElement: Prominent water sign placements (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces)
emotional_authority_water_signs.correlation: Emotional authority in HD aligns with water-element dominance in astrology. Both describe the same underlying sensitivity to emotional cycles and need for clarity over time.

gate_64_neptune_pisces.correlation: Gate 64 sits at the boundary of the mandala — pure inspiration without form. Neptune/Pisces in astrology maps the same dissolution-into-possibility territory.
gate_64_neptune_pisces.source: Structural position in both systems' 'endings/beginnings' sector

channel_34_20_sacral_throat.astroElement: Mars-Mercury contact (conjunction/trine), especially in fire signs
channel_34_20_sacral_throat.correlation: The 34-20 channel connects Sacral motor directly to Throat — pure 'in the now' manifestation. Mars-Mercury fire aspects describe the same instantaneous expression of vital force.

profile_6_2_saturn_return.correlation: The 6/2 profile has a documented three-phase life arc that mirrors Saturn's transit cycle: trial (0-28), roof (28-50), role model (50+). The first Saturn return marks when the 6-line 'returns from the roof.'
profile_6_2_saturn_return.source: HD Profile system — line 6 life arc; astrology Saturn return timing

incarnation_cross_quarter_of_civilizatio.correlation: The Quarter of Civilization in HD spans the zodiac section from Capricorn through Aries. Both systems point to building lasting structures, social organization, and legacy.
incarnation_cross_quarter_of_civilizatio.source: HD Quarter system gate positions overlaid on tropical zodiac wheel

undefined_head_center_neptune_aspects.astroElement: Neptune aspecting Mercury or the Ascendant
undefined_head_center_neptune_aspects.correlation: Both describe a permeable mental field — pressure from outside to think certain thoughts, difficulty distinguishing own mental impulses from collective. Neptune dissolves mental boundaries; undefined Head absorbs external inspiration pressure.
undefined_head_center_neptune_aspects.source: Center function descriptions vs. Neptune archetype

defined_heart_will_center_sun_leo_aries.astroElement: Sun in Leo or Aries, or Sun angular (1st/10th house)
defined_heart_will_center_sun_leo_aries.correlation: Defined Heart/Will Center in HD indicates consistent ego force and willpower. Sun in fire signs or angular positions describes the same self-directed vitality and capacity to commit.
defined_heart_will_center_sun_leo_aries.source: Center descriptions vs. solar archetype in astrology

channel_28_38_root_spleen.astroElement: Mars-Pluto contact, or Scorpio/8th house emphasis
channel_28_38_root_spleen.correlation: The 28-38 channel is the fight for meaning against death — existential struggle. Mars-Pluto and Scorpio/8th house in astrology describe the same buried, compulsive life-force confronting mortality.
channel_28_38_root_spleen.source: Channel archetype vs. Scorpio/Pluto archetype cross-system mapping
